desc: Man, standing, right arm outstretched before him, with the left arm hanging beside the body.
Man, standing, both arms raised in front, hands held vertically, handpalms outwards.
Man, standing, with arms raised at either side of the body , handpalms inwards.
Man, standing, head facing forwards, arms raised behind him, hand palms outwards.

Man, dancing, left leg straight, right knee in front of the left leg, right foot behind the left leg, toes at the hight of the left foot, right arm in front of the body, left arm raised at the back, hand at the hight of the head.
Man, standing, bend forwards, arms hanging downwards, extended towards the front.
A mummy with a long curved beard, standing upright.
Man, standing, right arm in front, holding a long stick/staff, left arm hanging beside the body, holding a piece of cloth.

The king, standing, with a long straight beard and short wig/coif, with a uraeus bound to the forehead, right arm forward, hand at the hight of the shoulder, holding a staff with a triangular piece (point down) at the hight of the waist, left arm hanging beside the body, holding a mace (T3) horizontally.
Man, standing, with a bend back, right arm forward, holding a staff/stick near the top, left arm hanging beside the body.
Man, standing, with a bend back, right arm forward, holding a staff/stick near the top, left arm hanging beside the body.
Man, standing, both arms towards the front, holding a branch, as if to strike with it.
Man, standing, back bend forward, right arm forward, holding a stick which slightly curves towards the body, left arm hanging beside the body.
Man, standing, right arm forward, forearm and hand at the level of the waist, left arm raised, forearm vertically, holding a stick nearly horizontally.
Man, standing, both arms raised in front, touching a vertically written wall with battlements near the top.
Man, standing, arms at either side of the body, holding the necks of two emblematic animals with panther heads, connected by a line which runs under the feet of the man.
Man, with short straight beard, seated on a chair, no arms visible.
A child, seated on nothing, forelegs separated, right arm raised with hand to mouth, left arm hanging beside the body.
A child, seated on nothing, forelegs separated, right arm raised with hand to mouth, left arm hanging beside the body.
Man, seated on heel, right leg extended with foot in front of left leg, right and left arm sloping downward to either side of the body.
Man, seated, right knee raised, right arm raised, left arm in front of body.
Man, seated, right knee raised, right arm raised with hand to mouth, left arm hanging beside the body.
Man, seated, right knee raised, right arm angled in front of the body, left arm raised, hand held verically, handpalm inwards (hnw gesture).

God, seated on heel, right knee raised, with long curved beard and coif, with a palm branch, stripped of leaves and notched on his head (M4), notch forward, raised arms at either side of the body, hands held vertically, with the handpalms inwards.
Man, seated, right knee raised, back straight, both arms raised in front, handpalms outwards.
Man, seated, right knee raised, back straight, both arms raised in front, handpalms outwards.
Man, seated, right knee raised, with a vase on its side, with liquid issuing from it (W54), orientated to the front, on his head, both arms raised towards the front, handpalms outwards.
Man, seated, right knee raised, a vessel on his head, right arm raised in front, with the hand at the vessel, left arm hanging beside the body.
Man, seated, right knee raised, right arm raised In front, holding a sceptre (S42), angled towards the head, left arm in front of the body, holding a stick, resting against the shoulder.

Man, seated on heel, right knee up, with a feather (H6) on his head, angling backwards, right arm forwards, forearm horizontal, holding a composite bow (T10), left arm in front of the body, holding a stick which angles backwards, leaning against the left shoulder.
God, seated, both knees up, with covered legs and arms, with a long curved beard and long wig.
Man, seated, both knees down, with short straight beard, both arms forward, forearms horizontal, one above the other, holding a flagellum (S45).

Man (shepherd), seated, both knees up, with covered legs and arms, with a short straight beard and short hair/wig, holding a stick which curves inwards, with a band of string or fabric, with the ties away from the body.

Man (shepherd), seated, both knees up, with covered legs and arms, with a short straight beard and short hair/wig, holding a stick which curves inwards, with a band of string or fabric, with the ties away from the body.
Man (enemy), seated on heel, both knees down, both arms behind the back, bound together with rope.
Man, curled up, right and left lower legs separated, back nearly horizontal, both arms forward, forearms horizontal, grasping a line of liquid (blood) which comes from the head.
Man, curled up, right and left lower legs separated, back nearly horizontal, both arms forward, forearms horizontal, grasping a line of liquid (blood) which comes from the head.
Man, written horizontally, facing down, arms raised in front.
Man, upside down, both arms raised at either side of the body, handpalms inwards.
A mummy with a long curved beard, lying horizontally.
Woman, seated, both knees up, with covered legs and arms, with long hair.
Woman, seated, both knees up, with covered legs and arms, with long hair, wearing a diadem, holding a flower which curves forward, with the flower orientated downwards.
Man, seated, both knees up, with covered legs and arms, with short hair/wig, holding an unknown object (mace/knife/stick?)
Woman, pregnant, seated, both knees down, with a band of cloth around the head, right arm forward, angling down towards the knee, left arm hanging beside the body.
Woman, pregnant, seated, both knees down, right arm forward, angling down towards the knee, left arm hanging beside the body, with 3 vertical lines coming from the legs.
Woman, pregnant, seated, both knees down, right arm forward, angling down towards the knee, left arm hanging beside the body, with the head and arms of a child coming from the legs.

Woman, seated, both knees down, nursing a child, seated on her lap, left arm forward, hand over the chest of the woman, right arm hanging beside the body; right arm forward, embracing/holding the child, left arm over the chest.
God, seated, both knees down, with a long curved beard and long hair/wig, wearing a headdress consisting of two feathers on rams horns (S77).
God, seated, knees up, with covered legs and arms, with the head of a Seth animal.
